label: Concept illustrations
evidence_boundary: Not UI screenshots or measured outcome evidence.
provenance: Owner-supplied artwork approved for public use on 2026-07-18.

illustrations.title: From idea to blueprint
illustrations.alt: Developer at a laptop sends a blue application blueprint through a small factory into code, data, interface, and server components.
illustrations.caption: Turn intent into an explicit, reviewable product blueprint before implementation begins.

illustrations.title: Shape the product
illustrations.alt: Developer turns an application blueprint into folders, a database, a web interface, and servers on a conveyor.
illustrations.caption: Bind requirements to a concrete product shape, target, and dependency order.

illustrations.title: Compile recurring decisions
illustrations.alt: Illustrated stack links an AI brain to Python gears and a locked execution box.
illustrations.caption: Move repeated decision logic into deterministic, inspectable code with explicit boundaries.

illustrations.title: Apply security contracts
illustrations.alt: Robotic arms inspect and stamp shields onto contract documents.
illustrations.caption: Make trust, identity, and release-policy expectations explicit and reviewable.

illustrations.title: Keep authority bounded
illustrations.alt: Robotic arm places keyhole plates onto identity cards moving along a conveyor.
illustrations.caption: Separate workflow evidence from credentials, deployment, publication, and approval authority.

illustrations.title: Challenge the gate
illustrations.alt: Robotic magnifiers inspect green checks and a deliberately broken check on a conveyor.
illustrations.caption: Deliberately break the control and require the validator to catch the failure.

illustrations.title: Route failures back
illustrations.alt: Robotic drills break a mobile interface while failed test samples collect beside it.
illustrations.caption: Attribute failures to the earliest responsible stage and preserve concrete evidence.

illustrations.title: Link signed proof
illustrations.alt: Signed receipts move through a glowing chain and split into accepted and rejected paths.
illustrations.caption: Hash-link reviewed artifacts and receipts while failed evidence remains visibly rejected.

illustrations.title: Release after proof
illustrations.alt: Team celebrates as a verified rocket, green check, and secured folder leave the factory.
illustrations.caption: Ship only after the required gates pass and the human-controlled release boundary is satisfied.
